prompt: Premium supplement product photography, hero shot. Center composition: a cylindrical protein supplement can with a deep navy blue label (#203061), bold orange sans-serif 'GLUCOFOOD' lettering on the label (#ea7b0b), gold metallic lid (#e69645), and a teal-white wave graphic band at the bottom of the label. The can is slightly angled 20 degrees, three-quarter front view, with a faint product illustration visible on the label. To the left foreground and slightly behind: a tall clear glass filled with a thick creamy vanilla protein shake — pale cream colored liquid with a generous frothy foam top, slight condensation droplets on the glass exterior, a metal straw inserted. Scattered artfully across the dark surface and air: 3 whole vanilla pods with slight split tips revealing their seeds, 2 vanilla orchid flowers with white-cream petals and golden stamen, a light dusting of fine vanilla powder particles frozen in air, two small droplets of cream milk mid-splash caught in motion to the right of the can. The surface below is a polished dark navy (#070f22) with faint specular reflections. Background: deep gradient from near-black (#02040d) at top to dark navy (#070f22) at bottom, no other objects. Lighting: warm key light from upper-left casting amber-gold (#ea7b0b) specular highlights on the can's metallic lid and a warm rim along the can's right edge; cool fill light from right giving the glass a slight blue-white translucency; product photography setup with 85mm lens, f/4.5, ISO 200. The can's orange label color and the warm amber lighting create a visually unified warm-orange palette against the cool dark background. Extreme detail: visible label printing texture, embossed brand logo, micro-condensation on glass, actual vanilla pod seeds visible inside split pods. Do not blur the product label. Do not add people. Do not add any text overlays. Photorealistic product photography. No artificial smoothing.
negative_prompt: text overlay, watermark, logo overlay, extra products, human hands, people, cartoon, illustration, 3D render, CGI, plastic look, oversaturated, blurry label, unreadable text, floating elements with no physics, studio white background, clipped highlights, excessive lens flare, artificial vignette, stock photo feel, generic supplement photo, flat lighting, beauty filter, airbrushed surfaces

settings.lighting: warm amber key light from upper-left, cool fill from right, 85mm f/4.5 ISO 200
settings.camera_angle: eye-level, slightly above product, 20 degree can tilt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate, product tack sharp, background soft gradient
settings.quality: high detail, photorealistic materials, no AI smoothing
